name: suganthan-gsc-mcp
description: Google Search Console MCP server for Claude. 27 SEO analysis tools including quick wins, traffic drops, content decay, cannibalisation, CTR opportunities, multi-site dashboards, and a full image-search suite (image keyword overview, image quick wins, web vs image comparison, image pages overview, image keyword trends, image impressions-no-clicks, image content decay). OAuth and service account support.
author: Suganthan Mohanadasan
